title: Lovely Charred Irish Lamb Biryani
description: A charred, crumbly, crowd-pleaser Irish dish featuring biryani masala, cooked in individual mini cocottes, with anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients. This recipe combines the flavors of Ireland and India in a unique and delicious way.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the ttukbaegi earthenware cook oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the biryani masala, turmeric, salt, and black pepper.
Add the basmati rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the lamb and spice mixture.
Transfer the mixture to individual mini cocottes.
Cover the cocottes with lids and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the lids and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until the top is lightly charred.
